indicators.name: large glass partition
indicators.rationale: Large glass partition obstructs view and may create a sense of isolation.

indicators.name: open-plan layout
indicators.rationale: Open-plan layout can lead to distractions and reduced privacy.

indicators.name: lack of flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: No flat surface at sitting height for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: low lighting levels
indicators.rationale: Low lighting levels may make it difficult to see the computer screens clearly.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large glass partition and open-plan layout create potential distractions and reduced privacy. The absence of a flat personal work surface and low lighting levels further undermine the suitability for focused solo work.
